title: Tools of the Apocalypse
description: Tools of the Apocalypse is self-explanatory. It adds a variety of melee weapons and tools to help you on your next Gun x Zombie Apocalypse modpack journey.
body:
**Tools of the Apocalypse** is a Fabric mod that adds a handful of Urban Weaponry that can pair up with your next Zombie/Parasite/Sculk Invasion adventure!

---

**Get a Taste** | The Baseball Bat is an item you can craft relativly quickly. With a handful of Flint and a couple pieces of iron, you can upgrade it into a Spiked Baseball Bat, ready to deal even more damage and retain a higher durability.

---

**Where's the Loot?** |

**Tier 1 Tools** - Found in Village Armorer Chests
-   Scrap Pickaxe
-   Scrap Hatchet
-   Scrap Crowbar
  
**Tier 2 Tools** - Found in Monster Room Dungeon Chests
-   Baton
-   Bush Knife
-   Machete
-   Fireaxe

**Tier 3 Tools** - Found in Stronghold Chests
-   Tactical Pickaxe
-   Tactical Hatchet
-   Tactical Crowbar
-   Tactical Fireaxe
-   Sledgehammer
-   Katana

---

**Solid Swaps** |
Tools of the Apocalypse can replace Picks, Axes, & Swords up to and a little past Gold Level.
*If there's enough demand I can make the tools completely replace Vanilla in purpose, but without the demand, I'm happy to leave it as is.*

**Better Combat** |
This mod comes with Better Combat compatibilty built-in and it's strongly recommended that you use it alongside TotA.

**Built for Modpack Developers First** |
TotA really doesn't fit into Vanilla without the careful hand of a thoughtful developer. For this purpose, TotA's MIT source-code is as neat as I can make it for you to parse through at your leisure.

**Note** |
The mod comes with some Vanilla Loot Tables injected already, however it's fully expected that you as a Modpack Developer tweak these tables to add TotA's gear into appropriate locations.
